body: This PR applies some type assertions and uses `map` / `Base.@_inline_meta` to unroll some loops and fix type inference for when tracers are added. May require https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1207. Nice, https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1207 is not even needed! 🎉
title: Fix tracer inference
